title: Rules for conduct of officers, employees
doc_html:
Art. 425.  Rules for conduct of officers, employees

Each court shall have power to frame and publish rules of procedure for the conduct of its officers and employees.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
doc_text:
Art. 425.  Rules for conduct of officers, employees
Each court shall have power to frame and publish rules of procedure for the conduct of its officers and employees.
Acts 1991, No. 235, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
